title: Admin Plan Management — runtime-editable plans on the DB

tasks.title: Add plan CRUD Zod schemas as SSOT in @repo/schemas
tasks.description: Create BillingPlanResponseSchema, CreateBillingPlanSchema, UpdateBillingPlanSchema, BillingPlanSearchSchema in packages/schemas, mirroring the qzpay billing_plans row shape (id UUID, name=slug, description, active, entitlements string[], limits Record<string,number>, metadata{category,displayName,isDefault,sortOrder,trialDays,hasTrial,monthlyPriceArs,annualPriceArs,monthlyPriceUsdRef}) plus the related billing_prices (monthly/annual). Mutation identifier = id (UUID) per D1. slug write-once: present in Create, OMITTED/forbidden in Update. Re-export from @repo/schemas. NOT loose in apps/api (SSOT rule from SPEC-143 promo fix). Tests: packages/schemas/test — parse valid payloads, reject missing id on update target, reject slug in Update, reject negative prices, reject unknown fields.

subtasks.title: Response/Create/Update/Search schemas mirroring qzpay row + prices
Enforce id=UUID identifier and slug write-once (Create only)

tasks.title: Add plan-mutation audit event + before/after diff helper
tasks.description: Wire the audit emission used by every plan write: reuse AuditEventType.BILLING_* (no new BILLING_PLAN_* per D2) and a field-level before/after diff helper for plan rows (price, entitlements, limits, active, metadata). Lives in service-core (alongside the billing audit pattern from SPEC-064). Tests: unit test the diff helper (added/removed/changed fields, price deltas, no-op when unchanged).

tasks.title: PlanService — read (list + getById) over qzpay storage adapter
tasks.description: Scaffold PlanService in packages/service-core/src/services/billing/plan/ with read methods backed by storage.plans.* (createBillingAdapter, packages/db/src/billing/drizzle-adapter.ts), NOT a hand-rolled BaseModel. list() and getById(uuid) map the qzpay row + billing_prices to BillingPlanResponseSchema (id + timestamps + metadata + prices). Tests: unit — mapping row→response, getById not-found returns typed error, list ordering by metadata.sortOrder.

tasks.title: PlanService — create (plan row + billing_prices + audit, in tx)
tasks.description: Implement create(input): map CreateBillingPlanSchema → qzpay billing_plans insert (name=slug, metadata, entitlements, limits) AND the related billing_prices rows (monthly always; annual only when annualPriceArs>0). Wrap in the billing transaction wrapper; emit audit (T-002) with before=null/after=row. Reject duplicate slug. Tests: unit — creates plan+monthly price, adds annual price when set, rolls back on price failure, duplicate-slug rejected, audit emitted.

subtasks.title: Unit tests (create, annual price, rollback, audit)

tasks.title: PlanService — update (incl. billing_prices, slug immutable)
tasks.description: Implement update(uuid, input): mutate plan row + sync billing_prices (create/update monthly + annual, deactivate annual when cleared). Enforce slug (name) immutability — reject any attempt to change it (D1). Wrap in tx, emit audit with before/after diff. Tests: unit — update price reflects in billing_prices, entitlements/limits update, slug-change rejected, audit diff correct, tx rollback on partial failure.

subtasks.title: Unit tests (price sync, slug-reject, rollback, audit)

tasks.title: PlanService — toggleActive + soft-delete
tasks.description: Implement toggleActive(uuid, active) and softDelete(uuid) (active=false default per D4), both emitting audit. soft-delete keeps the row for referential integrity. Tests: unit — toggle flips active, soft-delete sets active=false and is reversible via toggle, audit emitted, getById still resolves a soft-deleted plan.

tasks.title: PlanService — hard-delete with referential guard
tasks.description: Implement hardDelete(uuid): BEFORE deleting, query billing_subscriptions WHERE plan_id = uuid (D1: plan_id stores the UUID). If any subscription references the plan, REJECT with a typed error (referenced-by-subscriptions). Only delete when zero references. Emit audit. Tests: unit — hard-delete blocked when a subscription references the plan UUID, allowed when none, audit emitted, error type correct.

subtasks.title: Reference check: subs WHERE plan_id = uuid
Block hard-delete when referenced, else delete + audit

tasks.title: API — rewrite admin read endpoints to read from DB/service
tasks.description: apps/api/src/routes/billing/admin/plans.ts: switch GET / (list) and GET /:id from ALL_PLANS config to PlanService (response now includes id + timestamps + metadata). Gate with PermissionEnum.BILLING_READ_ALL (D2). Tests: integration — list/getById return DB shape with id; REGRESSION for the 502 (response now satisfies the admin transformPlanRecord contract); ADMIN→403 / SUPER_ADMIN→200 (SPEC-164).

subtasks.title: GET / and GET /:id read from PlanService

tasks.title: API — add create/update write endpoints (POST /, PUT /:id)
tasks.description: Add POST / (create) and PUT /:id (update) to admin/plans.ts wired to PlanService. Gate with PermissionEnum.BILLING_MANAGE (D2), apply per-route admin rate limit, and getActorFromContext(c) for actor.id on the audit call. Validate via @repo/schemas (T-001). Tests: integration — create returns id; update mutates; missing-perm→403; invalid body→422; slug-change-on-update→422.

tasks.title: API — lifecycle endpoints (toggle, soft-delete, restore, hard-delete)
tasks.description: Add PATCH /:id (toggle active), DELETE /:id (soft-delete), POST /:id/restore, DELETE /:id/hard to admin/plans.ts wired to PlanService (T-006/T-007). BILLING_MANAGE + rate limit + audit. {id} is the UUID. Tests: integration — toggle flips active; soft-delete then restore; hard-delete BLOCKED (409/422) when a subscription references the plan, allowed when none.

subtasks.title: DELETE /:id/hard with referential guard surfaced as 409/422

tasks.title: API — switch public /plans endpoint to DB/service source
tasks.description: apps/api/src/routes/billing/public/listPlans.ts: read active plans from PlanService/DB instead of ALL_PLANS, keeping the response shape backwards-compatible with the web client. Tests: integration — public list returns only active plans from DB; public and admin agree on the same plan after an edit.

subtasks.title: Read active plans from service, keep response shape

tasks.title: Admin — fix transformPlanRecord/types to DB response shape
tasks.description: apps/admin/src/features/billing-plans/: align transformPlanRecord + types to the DB response (id + metadata + timestamps) so QZPayPlanRecordSchema validation passes and the list stops 502-ing/falling back to config. Tests: unit/component — a DB-shaped record parses; usePlansQuery no longer errors on the real response.

subtasks.title: Align transformPlanRecord + types to DB shape

tasks.title: Admin — replace throwing plan storage with real HTTP adapter + wire mutations
tasks.description: apps/admin/src/lib/billing-http-adapter/: replace createThrowingStorage('plans') with a real adapter pointing to the new admin endpoints; wire useCreatePlanMutation/useUpdatePlanMutation/useDeletePlanMutation/useTogglePlanActiveMutation to the live routes (id-based). Tests: hook tests with mocked HTTP — each mutation hits the right method/path and invalidates the list query.

subtasks.title: Real plans HTTP adapter to new endpoints

tasks.title: Admin — wire PlanDialog to CRUD + restore Create button
tasks.description: apps/admin/src/features/billing-plans/: connect PlanDialog onSubmit to the real create/update mutations, restore the 'Create New' button in plans.tsx (remove the read-only omission), keep the slug field disabled on edit (slug immutable, D1). Tests: component — create flow submits POST, edit flow submits PUT, slug input disabled when editing.

tasks.title: Admin — fix plans page header + i18n copy
tasks.description: Update packages/i18n admin-billing.json plans.* keys (es/en/pt): drop 'managed in source code / read-only' verbiage, switch to edit-enabled copy, keep a soft audit-log hint. Fix the page header text on plans.tsx. Tests: i18n key-presence test across locales; render test asserts the new header.

tasks.title: Web — move pricing pages from SSG import to runtime endpoint (D3)
tasks.description: apps/web/src/pages/[lang]/suscriptores/planes/index.astro (+ turistas): stop importing ALL_PLANS at build time; fetch /api/v1/public/plans at runtime (SSR, prerender=false) and set Cache-Control: s-maxage=N, stale-while-revalidate. Preserve current rendering/sorting (by sortOrder, active only). Tests: e2e/integration — page renders plans from the endpoint; cache headers present.

subtasks.title: Switch planes + turistas pages to SSR endpoint fetch

tasks.title: Web/API — Cloudflare cache purge on plan save (D3)
tasks.description: On every successful plan write (create/update/lifecycle), trigger a Cloudflare cache purge for the public pricing URLs (and the /public/plans cache). Add the purge call after the audit commit in the route/service layer; make it best-effort (failure logged, not fatal). Tests: unit — purge invoked with the right URLs on save; not invoked on read; write still succeeds if purge fails.

tasks.title: Seed — harden idempotency so re-seed never clobbers runtime edits
tasks.description: packages/seed/src/required/billingPlans.seed.ts: confirm skip-by-slug idempotency keeps runtime-edited plans intact on re-seed; decide and implement the divergence policy (silent skip vs warn/report config-vs-DB drift). Tests: seed test — re-seed after a runtime edit does NOT overwrite the edited fields; (if chosen) a divergence warning is emitted.

tasks.title: Integration test — admin price edit reflects in /public/plans
tasks.description: End-to-end-ish integration test (API level): change a plan price via the admin write endpoint, then GET /api/v1/public/plans and assert the new price appears. Guards the display-vs-charge invariant at the API boundary.

subtasks.title: Test: PUT price → GET /public/plans returns new price

tasks.title: E2E + staging smoke — edit price → web reflects → checkout charges new
tasks.description: E2E: operator edits a plan price in admin → a freshly-loaded web pricing page shows the new price (after purge) → a new checkout charges the new price. Plus the SPEC-143 staging billing smoke against the real MP sandbox (billing-surface PR gate per CLAUDE.md). File the smoke sign-off.

subtasks.title: E2E: edit → web shows new price → checkout charges new
Staging billing smoke (real MP sandbox) + sign-off

tasks.title: Fix latent bug: migrate-addon-purchases.ts resolves plan by slug vs UUID
tasks.description: packages/db/src/billing/migrate-addon-purchases.ts:168-169 does ALL_PLANS.find(p => p.slug === row.planId) with a comment claiming plan_id is the slug. Per D1, plan_id is the UUID → this returns undefined every time. Fix to resolve by UUID (storage.plans.get(planId) or ALL_PLANS by id mapping) and correct the comment. Tests: regression — given a UUID plan_id, the resolver returns the right plan.

subtasks.title: Resolve plan by UUID, fix the misleading comment

tasks.title: Docs — operator guide + CLAUDE.md updates
tasks.description: Add docs/guides/managing-billing-plans.md (how to edit plans from admin, audit log location, rollback). Update packages/billing/CLAUDE.md (config now seeds the DB; DB is runtime source of truth) and the packages/db/CLAUDE.md plans gotcha (plan_id stores the UUID, mutate by id, slug immutable).

tasks.title: Docs — supersede ADR-020 with SPEC-168
tasks.description: Flip docs/decisions/ADR-020-billing-plans-source-of-truth.md status to 'Superseded by SPEC-168' and add a short pointer; optionally add ADR-021 documenting the DB-backed migration approach + the D3 cache strategy. No code.
